title: Property Consultant - BHIVE Workspace - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - BHIVE Workspace - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
